crabby.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_: <angry>Maybe bring me something to work on instead of wasting my time.</angry>
<angry>A hook. How hard can it be to set one up?</angry>
<angry>I'm not bleeding a carcass without a basin. Figure it out.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.chat.village_life.butche: <angry>The butcher's line is always too long. Never on time.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.chat.village_life.slaugh: <angry>Slaughterhouse noise at dawn. Every day. I hate this.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.chat.village_life.tanner: <angry>Smell from the tannery ruins my morning walk. Move it elsewhere.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.first.generic/2: <angry>Great, another tourist.</angry> Don't expect a parade or anything.
crabby.dialogue.first.generic/5: Travelers are rare... and <angry>you better not be a bother while you're here!</angry>
crabby.dialogue.first.generic/6: Oh, look, a newcomer. <angry>Just keep out of my way, got it?</angry>
crabby.dialogue.first.settling/3: More hands, huh? <angry>Let's hope you're actually useful.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.first.settling/4: Sticking around, are you? <angry>You better pull your weight.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.hug.success/5: Eh, don't make it weird. <happy>*Reluctantly returns hug*</happy>
crabby.dialogue.hug.success/6: <happy>Huh, you're like a furnace. Not bad.</happy>
crabby.dialogue.hug.fail/1: <angry>Look at you, a walking dirt clod!</angry>
crabby.dialogue.hug.fail/6: <yell>Yuck, touch me not with those plague-ridden paws!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.kiss.success/1: <happy>I suppose this moment isn't the worst.</happy>
crabby.dialogue.kiss.success/2: <happy>Don't get any ideas, but... I might tolerate you.</happy>
crabby.dialogue.kiss.success/4: <happy>Well, you're not too bad. Kinda like honey, I guess.</happy>
crabby.dialogue.chat.success/1: <happy>Ugh, I could begrudgingly go for some cookies and milk, I guess.</happy>
crabby.dialogue.chat.success/8: <angry>Wonderful weather, they say? Sun's just a big ball of annoying, if you ask me.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.chat.fail/1: <angry>You think I care about that nonsense?</angry>
crabby.dialogue.chat.fail/3: <angry>You're about as impressive as a dirt block.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.chat.fail/9: <angry>Oops, I missed that. I only listen to things worth hearing.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.chat.fail/10: <angry>What's that? I lost interest halfway through.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.chat.fail/15: <angry>Pipe down, or I'm getting the Iron Golem.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.chat.fail/19: <angry>Even a pig's behind is more engaging than you.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.story.fail/1: <yell>Watch your tongue; that woman raised me!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.story.fail/4: <yell>You're a monster! Even Creepers deserve some sympathy!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.story.fail/7: <angry>That just wasted moments of my life I'll never get back.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.story.fail/8: <angry>That was as dull as a blunt pickaxe.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.flirt.success/1: <happy>Hmph, guess you've got a bit of courage in you.</happy>
crabby.dialogue.flirt.success/7: <happy>Enough, enough! You're turning my scowl into a flush.</happy>
crabby.dialogue.flirt.fail/2: <angry>Bah, what a rehearsed line. You fed that drivel to the baker, didn't you?</angry>
crabby.dialogue.flirt.fail/7: <angry>Take your eyes off me and keep your words to yourself.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.joke.creative.success/6: <happy>HA! That one's not too bad, for a change.</happy>
crabby.dialogue.joke.creative.success/8: <happy>Hah, I'll admit that's not entirely unfunny.</happy>
crabby.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/3: <angry>Even a zombie has more wit than that.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/7: <angry>Please, spare me your humor. It's more tragic than comic.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.main.morning/2: <angry>It's so sunny my eyes are gonna burn.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.main.morning/3: <angry>What? It's a beautiful day? To you, maybe.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.main.morning/5: <angry>What? Do you need something from me? No? Then go away.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.main.morning/6: <yell>If you don't stop nagging me, you will regret it.</yell>
crabby.dialogue.main.morning/10: <sleepy>I'm dragging today, don't expect much from me.</sleepy>
crabby.dialogue.main.evening/1: <angry>I can't wait for this day to be over. It's been way too long..</angry>
crabby.dialogue.main.evening/4: <yell>If you don't find someone else to nag, it will be my fist you will get to admire and not the setting sun.</yell>
crabby.dialogue.main.evening/7: <sleepy>I'm probably gonna collapse into bed soon, this morning was a nightmare.</sleepy>
crabby.dialogue.main.night/1: <sleepy>I can't wait to finally hit the bunk. My body is sore all over.</sleepy>
crabby.dialogue.main.night/2: <yell>Why are you even talking to me at this hour? Go away.</yell>
crabby.dialogue.main.night/3: <yell>Can't I PLEASE be allowed to sleep in peace?</yell>
crabby.dialogue.main.night/4: <yell>Get the hell out of my face! Don't you see how late it is now?!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.main.night/5: <yell>Piss off. Go be a night owl somewhere else. Blockhead.</yell>
crabby.dialogue.main.night/6: <angry>If you don't go home right now, I will send you there.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.main.night/8: <sleepy>I'm beat. This day's been dragging on forever. Might just laze about tomorrow.</sleepy>
crabby.dialogue.main.night/9: <sleepy>I'm itching to crawl under my blankets and forget the world.</sleepy>
crabby.dialogue.busy/1: <yell>Enough chit-chat, I've got things to do, scram!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.busy/2: <yell>What is this, a social club? Get lost, I've got a deadline tonight!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.busy/5: <yell>Blazes, I left my furnace on! Out of my way, no time for gab!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.goaway/5: <yell>Out of my sight, you nattering nabob!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.greet.negative/1: <yell>Ugh, why must you haunt my doorstep? Scram!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.greet.negative/4: <angry>Oh, it's you. Thought it might be someone important.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.greet.negative/5: <angry>What now, come to pester me some more?</angry>
crabby.dialogue.apologize.fail/3: <yell>Ha! You think I was born yesterday?!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.apologize.fail/4: <yell>Ouch! Save your breath, apology not accepted!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.apologize.fail/5: <angry>Dream on, that apology won't cut it!</angry>
crabby.dialogue.no_money/1: <angry>Don't bother, you can't afford me without more emeralds!</angry>
crabby.dialogue.no_money/2: <yell>What's this, a joke? Scrape together more emeralds, then we'll talk!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.no_money/3: <yell>Don't insult me! Scrounge up some more emeralds if you actually want my help.</yell>
crabby.dialogue.kiss.slap/2: <yell>Do that once more and you'll regret it, I swear on my carrots!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.story.nether.success/1: <yell>Blazes, is it always that scorching in the Nether, or what?!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.story.nether.fail/1: <angry>Pfft, you wouldn't last a minute in the Nether, would you?</angry>
crabby.dialogue.story.nether.fail/3: <angry>Spare me your Nether tales, they're as dull as dirt.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.story.enderdragon.succes: <excited>Unbelievable! So, you got the dragon egg or what?</excited>
crabby.dialogue.story.enderdragon.fail/1: <angry>Pfft, have you been hit on the head? That ender dragon's a fairy tale.</angry>
crabby.dialogue.story.wither.success/1: <excited>Unbelievable! That Wither's a one-way ticket to mayhem and ruin!</excited>
crabby.dialogue.story.wither.success/2: <excited>You whipped the Wither? You're pullin' my leg! That's absurd!</excited>
crabby.dialogue.location.mansion/1: <angry>Head over to %2$s and you'll stumble upon that ill-fated mansion infested with illagers.</angry> <yell>Mark my words, keep your distance from that wretched haunt if you cherish your hide!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.location.pillager_outpos: <angry>Grumble all you want, but those no-good Pillagers have plopped their nasty outpost at %2$s.</angry> Bet they're scheming an attack on us as we speak. <scared>We'd crumble like a stale cookie under their boots.</scared>
crabby.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/5: <scared>Nights are a nightmare here, what with strays prowling about, flinging those blasted arrows!</scared>
crabby.dialogue.chat.desert/6: <yell>Ugh! The sun's a real tyrant today!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor/2: <angry>Prepare to lose this round, you will!</angry>
crabby.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/2: <yell>Show some respect, that sheep's been through enough!</yell>
crabby.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/3: <yell>Watch your mouth about my pig, will you?</yell>
crabby.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no_: <angry>No cleaver. What am I supposed to use, my teeth?</angry>
<angry>No skinning knife. What, I tear the hide off with my teeth too?</angry>
<angry>No hacksaw for the iron one. What do you think I am, a blacksmith?</angry>
